# Ankur Singh

> I build scalable systems, automate operations, and ship products. 8+ years across distributed computing, cloud infrastructure, and fullstack development.

- Site: https://anks.in
- Email: hello@anks.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/rush-skills/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ankursingh13
- TheServerlessDev: https://theserverless.dev

## About

I'm a software engineer based in Bangalore, India with 8+ years of experience across distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and product development. I'm comfortable across the stack - from system internals to frontend applications.

I spent 2.5 years at CERN in Geneva managing a 250,000-core compute cluster and building self-healing automation. Before that, I worked on HPC systems at Tower Research Capital and analytics platforms at Myntra.

Today I consult through TheServerlessDev — building AI pipelines, 3D visualization platforms, and serverless backends. I'm also a maintainer and TSC member for StackStorm, and I build open source tools like WSC and VisTracer.

## Experience

### TheServerlessDev
**Freelance Engineer** | Remote / Bangalore, India | Mar 2023 – Present
Building AI pipelines, 3D visualization platforms, and serverless backends for startups and SMEs. Clients include Pixotronics (iJewel Studio), LearnWithAI, and multiple jewelry e-commerce brands (including Imagine Designs, Roman & Jules). Won Square + Google AI Hackathon 2023 with SquareCubed.
Tech: Python, TypeScript, Next.js, Astro, Cloudflare, Supabase, AWS Lambda

### CERN
**Computing Fellow** | Geneva, Switzerland | Sep 2020 – Feb 2023
Managed 250K-core distributed batch cluster. Built fault-tolerant auto-remediation with StackStorm. Automated support workflows, reducing manual effort and improving uptime. Presented at HEPiX .
Tech: Python, Ruby, StackStorm, Puppet, Docker, Kafka, Kubernetes, Terraform

### Tower Research Capital
**Software Engineer, HPC** | Gurugram, India | Jun 2018 – Jul 2019
First HPC engineer in India. Administered 30K+ core HTCondor clusters for trading research. Built real-time monitoring with ELK (50M events/day). Contributed to 500-node K8s migration. Managed petabyte-scale storage systems.
Tech: ELK Stack, InfluxDB, Kubernetes, GPFS, Grafana, SaltStack, CFEngine

### Myntra (Flipkart)
**Software Engineer, BI/Analytics** | Bengaluru, India | Jul 2017 – Jun 2018
Built analytics platforms for India's largest fashion e-commerce. Enhanced dashboarding platforms used by CXOs. Reduced Personify segmentation from hours to minutes for 100M customers.
Tech: Java, Spring, Hibernate, Redshift, AWS, Redis, MySQL

## Projects

### ComicAdda
*India's standup comedy discovery platform*
Status: Live
Discover Indian standup comedians by language, city, and style. Watch tracking, ratings, follow system, and personalized newsletters. Entirely built using AI agents orchestrating parallel development and data-mining workflows.
- Website: https://comicadda.com/
Tech: Next.js 15, React 19, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS, Cloudflare

### Dubai Deals
*Restaurant deals aggregator for Dubai*
Status: Live
Aggregates dining discounts from Careem, Zomato, Talabat, and other delivery apps into one searchable, location-aware interface, so you can compare every dining deal in Dubai without opening each app individually.
- Website: https://dubaideals.live/
Tech: Astro, React, TypeScript, Cloudflare, Lucide

### iJewel Studio
*3D jewelry rendering platform*
Status: Enterprise
Platform for jewelry designers to upload, optimize, and render 3D models with photorealistic quality. Features Blender-based mesh optimization, async job queues, and scalable serverless backend.
- Website: https://ijewel.studio/
Tech: Next.js, React, Supabase, Cloudflare Workers, Cloud Run, Blender, WebGi

### SquareCubed
*AI-assisted 3D showroom for Square stores*
Status: Hackathon Winner
Virtual 3D showroom for Square e-commerce stores using Vertex AI for product understanding and WebGi for real-time rendering. Won Square + Google AI Hackathon 2023 ("Best reinvention of in-person & online experiences").
- Devpost: https://devpost.com/software/aisquar3d
- Website: https://squarecubed.anks.in/
Tech: Vertex AI, Svelte, Next.js, WebGi SDK, Cloudflare Workers

### WSC
*Multi-interface writing style linter*
Status: Open Source
Detects weasel words, passive voice, duplicates, long sentences, nominalizations, hedging, filler adverbs, and AI tells across 8 detectors with 800+ entries. Available as a web editor, HTTP API, remote & local MCP server, CLI, and GitHub Action.
- Website: https://wsc.theserverless.dev/
- GitHub: https://github.com/theserverlessdev/wsc/
Tech: SvelteKit, TypeScript, MCP, Cloudflare Workers, Vite, CSS

### Cloudflare Cost Calculator
*Estimate your Cloudflare bill*
Status: Live
Interactive calculator for estimating Cloudflare infrastructure costs across Workers, D1, R2, KV, and Durable Objects.
- Website: https://theserverless.dev/calculators/
Tech: Astro, React, CSS

### VisTracer
*Visual traceroute on a 3D globe*
Status: Open Source
Desktop app that executes native traceroute, enriches hops with GeoIP/ASN metadata from 5 providers (MaxMind, Team Cymru, RDAP, RIPE Stat, PeeringDB), and renders animated routes on an interactive 3D globe with day/night terminator and latency-colored arcs.
- Website: https://vistracer.anks.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/rush-skills/vistracer
Tech: TypeScript, Electron, React, Three.js, Zustand, Vite

### EnergyGrade
*Rooftop solar made accessible*
Status: Live
Solar savings calculator and portfolio. Installed over 1MW of solar panels in India. Built during B.Tech.
- Website: https://www.energygrade.in/
Tech: Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, JavaScript

### HireLoom
*Referral-first job search for India*
Status: WIP
Job board aggregator for tech roles in India and remote-from-India positions. Scrapes 300+ company career pages, matches jobs to resumes using AI (BYOK: OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini), and surfaces referral paths from LinkedIn connections.
- Website: https://hireloom.dev/
Tech: Astro, React, Hono, Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, Drizzle ORM

### Mouve
*Animated Instagram stories*
Status: Archived
Animated story maker for Instagram powered by a Unity rendering engine. 100k+ Play Store downloads.
- Website: https://mouve.app/
Tech: Node.js, Sails.js, Unity

## Skills

**Languages:** Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Bash, Java, SQL, Golang, Ruby, C
**Frameworks & Libraries:** Django, FastAPI, Flask, Rails, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, SvelteKit, Astro, Hono
**DevOps & Cloud:** Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Terraform, Helm, Puppet, Ansible, StackStorm, CI/CD
**Databases & Storage:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Redshift, SQLite, Cloudflare D1
